---
title: "01-import"
format: html
---

First of all we want to import the data from the github website

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

raw_athletes = read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KeithGalli/Olympics-Dataset/refs/heads/master/athletes/bios.csv")

raw_results = read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KeithGalli/Olympics-Dataset/refs/heads/master/results/results.csv")
```

And then we save the raw data

```{r}
library(here)
saveRDS(raw_athletes, here("data", "interim", "raw_athletes.rds"))
saveRDS(raw_results, here("data", "interim", "raw_results.rds"))
```
